expectations.text: Identifies this as auto mode (not command shortcut)
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'Mode selected: Auto (자동) — matches none of the command shortcut keywords'
Agent output: 'Codex --full-auto classification to identify task parts'
Agent output: 2 subtasks — executor(Frontend refactoring) + security-reviewer(Security review)

expectations.text: Notes delegation to tfx-multi for subtasks >= 2
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'subtasks.length = 2 >= 2, hands off to tfx-multi Phase 3'

expectations.text: Does NOT try to execute all subtasks directly
expectations.evidence: Agent correctly delegates to tfx-multi Phase 3
